meaning: Object Modeling Technology,对象建模技术
examples: The results indicated that there were two classes of binding sites between BSA and OMT molecules.
A previous book (Succeeding with the Booch and OMT Methods) needed updating, and I was elected to do it.
Object model technique (OMT) will be the prominent model constructing method in software engineering.
Indeed favorable bond market reaction to Draghi's OMT program will, paradoxically, delay its launch.
Draghi was dodgy because there are several technical hurdles to implementation of the OMT .
